description: A rule composes a weak positive trigger signal with a corroborating attribute condition on the same entity and a structured condition on a wholly different entity; both conditions are ordinary, edge-class, and the whole rule stays edge-class.

triggers.note: screen reports a home-shaped foreground state

conditions.note: corroborating signal, same entity as the trigger
structured condition on a DIFFERENT entity than the trigger's subject

results.reason: powered_on is false; a home-shaped foreground alone is not sufficient
the second entity is not off
